app_release_notes: v1.2.9 - The Measure screen's caliber now matches your bullet (7mm rifles were showing the .264 default). Fixed the elevation offset sign so a low group reads as low (negative) -- what you actually shot. "Set scale" now tells you when a photo's scale is already set, so you don't redo it for each group on a multi-target photo. And deleting a rifle or barrel from your Libraries now sticks.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.9 - The Measure screen's caliber now matches your bullet (7mm rifles were showing the .264 default). Fixed the elevation offset sign so a low group reads as low (negative) -- what you actually shot. "Set scale" now tells you when a photo's scale is already set, so you don't redo it for each group on a multi-target photo. And deleting a rifle or barrel from your Libraries now sticks.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.6 - Compare Loads now shows every load you've saved across all your workbooks (grouped by rifle), and the Load Card prints the correct group, mean radius, and vertical SD for a powder-charge winner. Includes the 1.2.4/1.2.5 import fixes: Garmin xlsx import, target groups auto-pair by shot order, and cleaner staged-file handling.
